prompt: A full-page premium strategy report cover background depicting a sophisticated, cinematic conceptual scene for a strategic assessment of a selected industry or technology. The composition shows a real-world or conceptual scene directly related to the researched field—such as a futuristic cityscape for urban tech, a clean energy grid for renewables, or a precision manufacturing line for advanced engineering—avoiding generic ocean waves, abstract blue filler, or unrelated decorative gradients.
